name: Tenovi Hardware Integration (HWI) API
description: The Tenovi Hardware Integration (HWI) API allows third-party clients to interact with remote patient monitoring (RPM) devices, gateways, fulfillment workflows, supplies, and more. Clients can receive measurement data from Tenovi devices via webhooks, activate/deactivate devices, manage patients, and handle fulfillment workflows.
